project_type: Next.js 16.2.4 full-stack web app (App Router) with Tailwind CSS 4
build_system: npm with next build. Node 22 via mise. AGENTS.md warns that Next.js 16.2.4 has breaking changes from training data - must read node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing code.
test_framework: No test framework installed yet. Will need to verify via build + lint.
build_command: eval "$(mise activate bash)" && cd /projects/sandbox/nextjs-medication-reminder && npm run build
test_command: eval "$(mise activate bash)" && cd /projects/sandbox/nextjs-medication-reminder && npm run lint
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build to verify TypeScript compiles and pages render. 2. Run npm run lint to check for code quality issues. 3. Manually verify API routes return expected JSON.
setup_instructions: 1. eval "$(mise activate bash)" to get node/npm in PATH. 2. cd /projects/sandbox/nextjs-medication-reminder. 3. npm install.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode - full access to install packages. Node 22 via mise (must run eval "$(mise activate bash)" before any node/npm commands). No database server available - will use JSON file-based storage for MVP.
contribution_requirements: AGENTS.md: Read node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing code since Next.js 16.2.4 has breaking changes. Steering file: Use responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes and semantic HTML for all layout sections.
key_patterns: App Router file-system routing. Route handlers in app/api/*/route.ts using Web Request/Response APIs. Server components by default, 'use client' directive for interactive components. Server Actions with 'use server' directive. Tailwind CSS 4 with @import 'tailwindcss' and @theme inline block in globals.css. Geist font family configured in layout.tsx.
directory_structure: app/ - App Router pages and layouts. app/api/ - will contain route handlers (backend). public/ - static assets. node_modules/next/dist/docs/ - Next.js 16 documentation (MUST READ).
